title: Bridge Essay: Gut markers of bodily self-consciousness in men.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Gut, markers, of, bodily, self-consciousness.

**Gut markers of bodily self-consciousness in men.** — iScience. PMID: 36185370. DOI: 10.1016/j.isci.2022.105061. Bodily self-consciousness, the state of mind that allows humans to be aware of their own body, forms the backdrop for almost every human experience, yet its underpinnings remain elusive. Here we combine an ingestible, minimally invasive capsule with surface electrogastrography to probe if gut physiology correlates with bodily self-consciousness in asample of healthy men during avirtual bodily illusion.
